title: SpecGroup
description: A collection of atomic specs tied to a PRD version, with two-dimensional state tracking

id.description: Unique identifier for the spec group (sg-<slug>)

title.description: Human-readable title for the spec group

prd.description: Link to PRD document. Nullable for bootstrap/infra specs with no linked PRD (AC-1.3).

source.description: Where the PRD lives. local-file is the preferred option for in-repo PRDs at .claude/prds/.

document_id.description: External document ID (for google-docs/notion) or unique identifier within source system

version.description: PRD version this spec group is tied to (1, 1.0, 2.0, etc.) OR the transitional placeholder 'unknown' per AC-1.4. The primary numeric subpattern remains ^[0-9]+(\.[0-9]+)*$; 'unknown' is a transitional literal accepted during migration.

content_hash.description: First 8 chars of SHA-256 hex digest of the PRD content. Nested under prd per AC-4.5a / inv-contract-cfa12b. Declared here per AC-1.7 / inv-contract-6d9a12 to prevent strict validator from rejecting post-migration manifests.

last_sync.description: Last time requirements were synced from PRD source

url.description: Direct URL to the PRD document or repository

repo_url.description: URL of the git repository (for git-repo source). Example: git@mac-mini:prds.git

branch.description: Git branch name (for git-repo source). Defaults to main.

file_path.description: Path to the PRD file. For local-file source, use .claude/prds/<slug>/prd.md. For git-repo source, use the path within the repository.

tag.description: Git tag representing the current PRD version (for git-repo source). Example: prd-project-x-v1.2.0

id.description: Optional nested PRD identifier (legacy-flat prd_id is migrated here).

review_state.description: Has the user approved this spec group? DRAFT=needs review, REVIEWED=user has seen it, APPROVED=ready for implementation

work_state.description: Where is the implementation? PLAN_READY=not started, IMPLEMENTING=in progress, VERIFYING=gates running, READY_TO_MERGE=all gates passed, MERGED=done

updated_by.description: Who made the last update (affects state transitions). REQUIRED per REQ-M1-003. Enum tightened from legacy [agent, user] to [agent, human] per DEC-A1-SCHEMA-MIGRATE; migrate-manifest.mjs rewrites legacy 'user' -> 'human'.

coverage.description: Percentage of requirements covered by atomic specs

browser_tests_passed.description: DEPRECATED alias for manual_tests_passed. Kept as optional nullable for backward compat with ~25 in-flight manifests (REQ-009-b, no bulk rename). New manifests SHALL use manual_tests_passed.

manual_tests_passed.description: Advisory gate for bounded exploratory verification via manual-tester. null if not applicable. Not enforced by Stop hook.

decision_log.description: Timestamped log of state changes and decisions

last_progress_update.description: ISO timestamp of last progress update. Used by heartbeat system to detect stale work.

heartbeat_warnings.description: Count of consecutive heartbeat warnings issued. Resets to 0 when progress is logged.

session_id.description: UUID of the session that last worked on this spec group

last_atomic_spec.description: ID of the last completed atomic spec

checkpoint_state.description: State at checkpoint: clean=between phases, in_progress=mid-work, interrupted=abnormal termination

last_session_id.description: UUID of the last session that modified this spec group

priority.description: Optional priority marker (e.g., P0, P1, P2).

related_prds.description: Optional list of related PRD slugs.

workflow.description: Optional workflow type that produced this spec group (e.g., oneoff-vibe, oneoff-spec, orchestrator, refactor, journal-only).

target_codebase.description: Optional hint at the primary codebase / subsystem affected.

investigation_status.description: Optional status marker for the investigation phase. Nullable for legacy manifests.

last_investigated.description: Optional timestamp of the last interface-investigator dispatch.

amendment_delta.description: Optional structured record of amendments applied to this spec group after initial approval.

assumptions.description: Optional list of captured assumptions for this spec group.

milestones.description: Optional milestone breakdown (used by multi-milestone WorkstreamSpecs). Accepted as either an array of milestone objects or an object keyed by milestone id (e.g., {M1: {...}, M2: {...}}).

e2e_skip.description: If true, the e2e-test-writer dispatch is skipped for this spec group.

e2e_skip_rationale.description: Required rationale when e2e_skip is true.

spec_group.description: Optional nested metadata block carried by some legacy/orchestrator manifests. Accepted as either a nested object or a string identifier (some legacy manifests carry it as a duplicate string identifier).

spec_mode.description: Practice 2.4 bug-fix-mode signal (sg-pipeline-efficiency-ws2-practice-2.4 / AC-005.1, AC-005.2). Positive signal used by test-writer isolation hook and record-test-writer-unlock CLI to distinguish bug-fix workstreams from feature workstreams. Default `feature`; fail-closed to strict isolation when absent. Only `spec_mode: bug-fix` activates hybrid-mode eligibility.

specs.description: Optional list of enumerated sub-specs (orchestrator-tier manifests).
